response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video: 00:00-00:22 is a static image. 00:22-end is the animated music video for 'Shiawase√Koyorinium' by Hakui Koyori. 2. Identified the song title from the lyrics on screen and verified via search. 3. Used lyrics search to find the full lyrics. 4. Compiled information into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features Hakui Koyori performing her original song 'Shiawase√Koyorinium' (also known as SHIAWASE KOYORINIUM). The video alternates between a static promotional image and an in-game animated sequence featuring the character in a room. The lyrics are in Japanese.

scenes.description: A static image promoting Hakui Koyori's new 3D reveal and 'Gaming Song Live' event. The text includes '重大会告' (Major Announcement), '新3Dお披露目日' (New 3D Reveal Date), and '博衣こより生誕Live 2026'.
The song 'Shiawase√Koyorinium' begins with the performer singing. The video shows an animated, in-game view of the character in a room. Lyrics appear on screen.
scenes.song_title: シアワセ√コヨリニウム (Shiawase√Koyorinium)
